basic_details.job_title: GBPUAT Seed Production Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: G. B. Pant University of Agriculture & Technology (GBPUAT)
basic_details.short_information: G. B. Pant University of Agriculture & Technology (GBPUAT) Seed Production Manager Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of GBPUAT. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the GBPUAT Seed Production Manager Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: M.Sc. (Horticulture/ Vegetable Science). 4 years Bachelor degree/ 3 years Bachelor degree along with NET+ M.Sc. is essential.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 13-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 13-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: GBPUAT Seed Production Manager Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GBPUAT Seed Production Manager recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive applications for the GBPUAT Seed Production Manager post is 13th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the university by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Seed Production Manager post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. in Horticulture or Vegetable Science. Additionally, a 4-year Bachelor's degree or a 3-year Bachelor's degree along with NET and M.Sc. is essential.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Seed Production Manager position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Seed Production Manager post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 60,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Seed Production Manager post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Seed Production Manager in the G. B. Pant University of Agriculture & Technology recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the GBPUAT Seed Production Manager recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Seed Production Manager role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Seed Production Manager position at GBPUAT will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is G.A.I.V. 9.6. 2024.

faq.question: Q9. In which city is the G. B. Pant University of Agriculture & Technology located?
faq.answer: G. B. Pant University of Agriculture & Technology is located in Pantnagar, Uttarakhand, with the pincode 263145.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Seed Production Manager position at GBPUAT is contractual.
